programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley turn a 1904 single-story bungalow into an adorable home with two bedrooms, two bathrooms, and garage space; a built-in banquette, nostalgic cabinet casings, and an accent wall highlight the interior design.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that's near the beach, and after seeing it, they know they have to buy it.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Camelbacks are not common in Galveston, Texas, but the challenge is to make this one a historic head-turner; the Cordrays transform the attic into a cozy family space and build an outdoor sofa that a Gulf storm can't destroy.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley buys a tiny home without consulting Michael, and he's shocked to discover it needs to move six miles across the island; as costs rise, they wonder if they'll be able to turn a profit.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family calls on Chase and his team to turn their camp into a vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come; the team creates a work of art that includes pine walls and ceilings and extra sleeping space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a family's 1800s cabin that has a personal connection to Chase and Ashley; it was previously renovated by their dad, Eric; they follow his lead by refurbishing the landscape, adding a bathroom and making better use of the space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team update the interior kitchen, refresh the bedrooms, and more in the Cooper family's cottage that their grandfather built in the 1970s.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Two animal lovers call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary; the crew works to bring modern-day amenities into a cabin that's over 100 years old while maintaining its rustic appeal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team update the interior kitchen, refresh the bedrooms, and more in the Cooper family's cottage that their grandfather built in the 1970s.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Two animal lovers call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary; the crew works to bring modern-day amenities into a cabin that's over 100 years old while maintaining its rustic appeal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a family's 1800s cabin that has a personal connection to Chase and Ashley; it was previously renovated by their dad, Eric; they follow his lead by refurbishing the landscape, adding a bathroom and making better use of the space.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the crew are called to Pennsylvania to salvage their first-ever cabin built by settlers from Finland; while they're excited to learn a new style of construction, Mark must figure out how to unstack the unorthodox cabin without damaging it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark challenges the guys to create a new system of notches to build a timber frame; the new notches are put to the test alongside salvaged floorboards used to design massive trusses.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: White Sulphur Springs, W.V., is a small town with big plans after a tragic flood devastates the community; the Barnwood Builders play a big part in this small town's revival as they build a log cabin and timber frame.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: With a little help from her kids, Joanna prepares her family's Sunday night dinner featuring pot roast, a braided bread, romaine salad with buttermilk ranch dressing and warm apple pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna whips up her granddad's Syrian doughnut recipe and cookies that Crew loves so much she named them after him; then, she completes her after-school snack lineup with chewy granola bars and warm banana bread.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna celebrates Taco Tuesday by making Mexican street tacos with chicken and steak, radish slaw, street corn, Mexican crema sauce, mango avocado salad and finishes it off with a special churro recipe she learned in Mexico.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna invites a few friends for a light lunch in the garden and prepares curry chicken salad, cauliflower couscous, peach caprese and lemon bars; Joanna's sister, Mikey, helps her with a taste test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna helps reimagine the idea of sandwiches as she deep fries her favorite Monte Cristo sandwich and makes crunchy bread and butter pickles, refreshing strawberry tea and a decadent blueberry buttermilk puff.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna puts a spin on breakfast classics, including eggs benedict.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple looks for a forever home large enough for the whole family along the shores of Rocky Point, N.Y.; they need to put all their time and sweat into overhauling a fixer-upper to achieve their dream of owning a home close to the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Texas-Sized Renovation on North Padre Island
programme.desc: A Texas bar owner looks for a peaceful oasis by the water on North Padre Island; she wants to score a deal on a fixer-upper that is ripe for a remodel, and she plans to save even more cash by tackling the renovations herself.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Skydivers and Screwdrivers in New Jersey
programme.desc: A thrill-seeker and his girlfriend search for a beach house in the New Jersey summer town where he vacationed as a kid; renovation help comes from a contractor he met through his love of extreme sports like skydiving and base jumping.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: An Alabama couple looks for a vacation home along the shores of Panama City Beach, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple sets out to fix up a property along the scenic Pacific Northwest coastline in Ocean Shores, Washington, so they can pass along childhood memories of growing up by the beach to their daughter.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A family of three moving from Colorado to Texas wants a slower pace and a big-acreage home with modern flair, unavailable where they're coming from.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna's longtime friend Brett has a dream of living on a houseboat on Lake Waco, but his tight budget and space create plenty of design challenges.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Jenny and Ramil are moving to Waco, Texas, from California to be closer to Ramil's mother; they are looking for something that needs work despite initial concerns.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Andrew and Brittany are first-time buyers; they're looking for a home with plenty of space for their beloved pooches.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Seeking to escape to a place where their family can unplug and enjoy nature, Jason and Crystal set out to build a 320-square-foot cabin on the Maine coastline in just 12 days with the help of a small group of friends.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home; they have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A fantasy-loving family decides to build their own underground home in the hills of Virginia; with shipment delays, errors and severe weather, the couple must fight to make their dream world a reality.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state; Mother Nature and bleeding-edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple wants to build a country cottage on their remote family farm in southeast Georgia despite the fact that building that kind of structure in four months will be anything but easy; the novice builders face material delays, hurricanes and wildlife.

programme.desc: A fantasy-loving family decides to build their own underground home in the hills of Virginia; with shipment delays, errors and severe weather, the couple must fight to make their dream world a reality.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: A museum in Townsend, Tenn., enlists the Barnwood Builders to restore a 19th-century gunsmith's cabin to be the centerpiece of an exhibit; after repairing the timbers, the team faces the challenge of stacking them flush with a 9-foot ceiling.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: "The Barnwood Builders" return to Lake Lure, N.C., to rebuild Russel's Fort, a historic 1770s log cabin they salvaged months before; the fort now has a gorgeous view of the lake, but the build is full of challenges.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys head to Albertville, Ala., to build a log cabin guest house high atop Sand Mountain; Mark visits a finished cabin he and the guys built on Lake Guntersville; Sherman and Johnny visit a woodturner who makes handcrafted wooden tops.

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth makes pear and Gorgonzola pizza as well as a rustic garbanzo bean soup with chili oil.

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth wants to celebrate a close friend who recently had twins; to give her a chance to relax, Elizabeth prepares a roasted cherry tomato tart and chocolate chip cookies for brunch on the ranch.

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: It's lavender season on the ranch; Elizabeth's friends and family help harvest the lavender field behind her parents' house; as a thank you, Elizabeth makes chicken piri piri and lemon cake with lemon curd buttercream frosting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth Poett welcomes us to her family's 14,000-acre ranch in California; working side by side with her husband, Austin, she tends to the land beginning at dawn; for dinner, she prepares a Santa Maria Style Tri-Tip and a Blackberry-Apple Galette.

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Life as a rancher and a mom can be busy, so Elizabeth invites close friends and fellow moms to the ranch for a well-deserved night off; she prepares ribeye steaks and serves a walnut cake with burnt butter cream frosting for dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth spends the day working cattle with her father at the historic Red Corrals; later, she hosts her parents for dinner and prepares some of their favorites, including arroz con pollo and lemon meringue pie.

programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family of 30.
